action_instruction: Checking whether the bottom navigation bar is visible on screen
intent: PRIMARY: is the Bottom navigation bar visible on screen? answer true or false | HINTS: look at very bottom for tabs labeled Home, Leaderboard, plus button, Profile

action_params.query: PRIMARY: is the Bottom navigation bar visible on screen? answer true or false | HINTS: look at very bottom for tabs labeled Home, Leaderboard, plus button, Profile

action_instruction: Checking whether the Streak counter is visible/present on the screen
intent: PRIMARY: is Streak counter present on screen visible/present? answer true or false | HINTS: look near the top-right of the Home page header for a flame icon with a number (e.g., 0)

action_params.query: PRIMARY: is Streak counter present on screen visible/present? answer true or false | HINTS: look near the top-right of the Home page header for a flame icon with a number (e.g., 0)

assertion_tree.description: Verify the Home tab is shown: a bottom navigation bar is visible and a streak counter is present on screen.

sub_results.description: Bottom navigation bar is visible on screen
Streak counter is present on screen
